title: Panacea Products Wine Bottle And Glasses Caddy
features: Keeps your favourite bottle of wine and wine glasses ready for serving

description: This wine bottle and glasses caddy is a Panacea exclusive. Keeps your favourite bottle of wine and glasses ready for serving. Great for decks, patios, and picnics, the powder-coated finish and rugged iron construction will last several years. No assembly required.
